period will have this silver lining ? Let us suppose that in a
planet's Astakavarga chart certain Rasi contains only one
benefic dot. This benefic dot must have been contributed by
one of the 8 significators. Now these significators have been

266 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
given certain order of precedence. So if you divide a Rasi into
8 equal parts, this benetic dot will take its due position some-
where. When this planet, whose Astakavarga is under con-
sideration, transits the particular part of the Rasi to which the
benetic dot belongs the native will have some relief. Now let
us see the order of precedence of the 8 significators. When
you divide a Rasi into 8 equal divisions the first division would
belong to Saturn, the second to Jupiter, the third to Mars, 4th to
the Sun, 5th to Venus, 6th to Mercury, 7th to the Moon and
the 8th to the Ascendant. The order of these depends on the
distance of the orbits of the heavenly bodies. You know that
